# L

## Light

When you take the [[attack]] action on your turn and attack with a Light weapon, you can make one extra attack as a [[bonus_action Action]] later on the same turn. That extra attack must be made with a different Light weapon, and you don't add your ability modifier to the extra attack's damage unless that modifier is negative. For example, you can attack with a [[shortsword]] in one hand and a [[dagger]] in the other using the [[attack]] action and a [[bonus_action Action]], but you don't add your Strength or Dexterity modifier to the damage roll of the [[bonus_action Action]] unless that modifier is negative.
